title: stachys recta subsp. olympica
intro: Stachys recta subsp. olympica, also known as the Greek Betony, is a subspecies of the Stachys recta plant, a type of flowering perennial native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as digestive problems, headaches, and skin irritations. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to relax muscles, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Stachys recta subsp. olympica is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
